price_type: Precio de venta al público con IVA
source_references: Ministerio de Sanidad Nomenclator full Excel export
interpretation_text: Precio de venta al público con IVA is the Spanish public retail price including VAT as published in the Ministerio de Sanidad Nomenclator. It maps to comparison_category=public_retail_price.
includes_margin: public retail price including VAT and applicable pharmacy-level components
caveats: The Nomenclator also contains non-medicine health products; the delegate filters rows without Tipo de fármaco.
This lane should only be compared with other public_retail_price lanes unless an explicit derivation rule bridges margins/VAT.

notes: The Nomenclator also contains non-medicine health products; the delegate filters rows without Tipo de fármaco.
This lane should only be compared with other public_retail_price lanes unless an explicit derivation rule bridges margins/VAT.

source_references: Infarmed — Margens de Comercialização e Fatores de Conversão, Conversão dos PVP em Espanha
interpretation_text: Derived PVA/ex-factory price from Spanish PVP con IVA using the official PVP-to-PVA conversion tiers used for reference-country price calculations. It maps to comparison_category=manufacturer_price and is generated as a virtual price lane with a DerivationRule, not by mutating the observed public retail record.
adjudication_notes: The derivation removes standard VAT/margin components using published conversion tiers. Confidential discounts/rebates and product-specific arrangements are not observable.
includes_margin: no standard wholesale/pharmacy margins after derivation
caveats: Derived lane; always inspect the linked DerivationRule before headline use.
Conversion tiers are policy formulas and may not represent confidential net transaction prices.

notes: Derived lane; always inspect the linked DerivationRule before headline use.
Conversion tiers are policy formulas and may not represent confidential net transaction prices.

derivation_rules.source_price_type: Precio de venta al público con IVA
derivation_rules.formula: tier 1: pva = pvp_including_vat / divisor; higher tiers: pva = (pvp_including_vat / (1 + vat_rate)) - fixed_margin
legal_basis: Infarmed reference-country PVP-to-PVA conversion table for Spain
caveats: Policy conversion tiers do not represent confidential net transaction prices.
